title: Wargs Again
text: The same clearing, or one like it. You're not sure until you hear the same low growl from the treeline — the same pack, or another. This time they don't wait. They come straight in.

title: The Collar Draws Notice
text: A lone traveler on the path eyes the tooth you took from the warg's collar — then your face. They don't say anything. They don't need to. Whoever was running those beasts has people everywhere.

title: Where They Went
text: The wargs broke and ran. You find their trail easily — they weren't trying to hide. It leads to a hollow where something bigger was waiting. You don't see it now. You're not sure you want to.

choices.text: Leave the hollow and move on
